commit_scope: Publish real Hati-OS public asset build lanes and add Hati mesh organ identity/channel presence for the Android sensing app.

local_validation.notes: Built real macOS and Android native packages plus a debug Android mesh-organ APK with SHA256 sidecars. macOS binary executed fib/sum/ack parity locally; Android native kernel package file-checked as ARM64 ELF executable and C-ABI shared library exporting form_eval/form_eval_free. GPU, DSP, and MLX/equivalent lanes are cataloged and capability-gated as floors; active native accelerator dispatch receipts remain missing. Form validate.sh proofs are 3-kernel only; fourth-arm proof remains a tracked gap until the Hati native arm runs the same bands directly.

self_review.notes: Rendered Hati-OS download page with local web and API services running. Visual floor is readable and links are visible; dev-only console entries were React DevTools/HMR.

sister_agent_review.requested: pre-release review of accelerator floor/north-star honesty, Android dashboard surface, screenshot evidence, and web screenshot
sister_agent_review.result: Accelerator honesty passed: GPU/DSP/MLX are represented as floor rows and missing dispatch receipts, not full support. Web screenshot is readable. Review flagged Android runtime screenshot blocker, scroll/layout risk, hint-only labels, stale QR payload, and local runtime DB hygiene.
sister_agent_review.remediation: Moved the Android app surface into one ScrollView, added persistent field labels/content descriptions, added QR refresh on mesh API edits, and restored runtime DB side effects. Android runtime screenshot remains blocked until a device or AVD is available.

android_runtime_screenshot.reason: No attached Android device and no configured Android Virtual Device on this host; adb is present at /opt/homebrew/share/android-commandlinetools/platform-tools/adb.
android_runtime_screenshot.floor: APK builds and is packaged; README and Form docs require actual Android screenshot before release when a device/emulator lane is available.
android_runtime_screenshot.north_star: Automated Android device/emulator screenshot and accessibility receipts are attached to release evidence.

deploy_validation.summary: GitHub release assets are public and range-readable. hati.earth redirect deployment verification still needs to run after merge/deploy.

phase_gate.gate: Native assets are buildable locally, mesh organ identity/channel routes are proven locally, and public release upload is prepared.
phase_gate.next: Upload release assets, verify public URLs, push PR, merge, and verify hati.earth redirects after deploy.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Hati-OS downloads can be built as real assets, and Android sensing organs can identify themselves with a stable install id, explicitly bind a user-entered cell/email label, announce and heartbeat to hati.mesh, discover peer organs through the public API, offer channels, and display measured sensor flow rates. GPU, DSP, and MLX/equivalent support is represented as an explicit minimal floor with north-star dispatch receipts rather than full support.
test_flows: Form proofs return expected verdicts: tool-channel 255, Hati-OS target distribution 4095, and hati.mesh identity/channel rows 255.
API test creates organ announce, heartbeat, and channel offer receipts.
Android Gradle build produces a debug APK with stable organ id, mesh/channel UI, resource dashboard, QR identity offer, and accelerator floor rows.
Playwright captures a local web/API screenshot for the Hati-OS download service; Android runtime screenshot is blocked until a device or AVD is available.
Asset build emits macOS tarball, Android native kernel tarball, Android mesh APK, SHA256 files, and summary JSON.
e2e_validation.summary: Local proof is complete; public URL proof follows release upload and web deploy.
